name: Holiday Almond Treats
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, blend the vanilla crumbs, 1 cup of ground almonds, powdered sugar, and cinnamon.
2. Stir in pumpkin pie mix until combined.
3. Add amaretto to taste.
4. Form mixture into small balls (approximately 2-inch diameter).
5. Roll each ball in remaining ground almonds.
6. Refrigerate until set.
